directories.name: .hermes
directories.note: Profil Hermes principal: config, mémoire, skills, state.db, cron, sessions. À sauvegarder.

directories.name: hermes-webui-zziw
directories.note: Déploiement Docker Hermes WebUI + agent. Compose/service principal.

directories.name: hermes-token-monitor
directories.note: Dashboard local de consommation tokens Hermes.

directories.name: lightpanda
directories.note: Navigateur headless Lightpanda installé pour tests web.

directories.name: ai-video-factory-v10-investisseurs-site
directories.note: Version investisseur du site AI Video Factory.

directories.name: ai-architecture-advisor
directories.note: Prototype SaaS questionnaire / conseiller architecture IA.

directories.name: netflix-perso
directories.note: Application Netflix Perso + téléchargements. Dossier volumineux; exclure les médias pour backup léger.

directories.name: hermes-tools-site
directories.note: Source éditable du mini-site actuel Tools/Skills/Inventaire.

servers.name: Netflix Perso V1
servers.access: Torrent UI : port 8090 · Jellyfin : port 8096 · qBittorrent : 6881
servers.note: Stack privée façon Netflix : upload .torrent/magnet, suivi téléchargement, streaming navigateur via Jellyfin. Données média lourdes dans data/media à exclure du backup léger.

servers.name: Hermes WebUI + Agent
servers.access: WebUI exposée sur port Docker 32768 · agent interne 8642
servers.note: Déploiement Hostinger Hermes WebUI avec volume Hermes partagé.

servers.name: Hermes Agent Hostinger initial
servers.note: Instance agent initiale/secondaire conservée dans l’inventaire.

servers.name: Hermes Token Monitor
servers.note: Suivi consommation tokens Hermes/OpenAI/Codex, service systemd hermes-token-monitor.

servers.name: Lightpanda Browser CDP
servers.note: Navigateur headless local pour tests web rapides, capture et QA automatisée.

servers.name: Nginx Static Sites
servers.note: Serveur public Nginx principal, routes ajoutées sans remplacer les sites existants.

useful_modifications.title: Création Netflix Perso V1
useful_modifications.body: Ajout d’une stack Docker composée de torrent-ui, qBittorrent et Jellyfin. Objectif : workflow torrent légal privé, suivi progression, puis streaming navigateur.

useful_modifications.title: Mise à jour stratégie backup Netflix Perso
useful_modifications.body: Le backup léger doit inclure compose, app et configs utiles, mais exclure data/media, téléchargements vidéo, caches/transcodes Jellyfin et fichiers reconstructibles.

useful_modifications.title: Déploiement Hermes WebUI + agent
useful_modifications.body: Création du dossier Docker Hermes WebUI/Agent, volume Hermes home partagé et service web exposé par Docker.

useful_modifications.title: Ajout Hermes Token Monitor
useful_modifications.body: Service systemd local sur 127.0.0.1:8787 pour suivre state.db, consommation token, stats et analyses de coûts.

useful_modifications.title: Installation Lightpanda Browser
useful_modifications.body: Service local CDP sur 127.0.0.1:9222 pour navigation headless et tests d’interfaces sans navigateur lourd.

useful_modifications.title: Site Hyundai Diagnostic en racine Nginx
useful_modifications.body: Site multi-pages de diagnostic automobile publié comme racine /var/www/hyundai-diagnostic.

useful_modifications.title: Site GMS Lanzarote
useful_modifications.body: Déploiement /gms/ pour le site marine-électricien GMS, avec backups de versions et attribution josédelapalma.

useful_modifications.title: Variantes GMS Bitoma / ToTo
useful_modifications.body: Ajout routes /gms-bitoma/ et /GmsVersionToTo/ avec gestion de casse et symlink, puis vérification Nginx.

useful_modifications.title: Hermes Tools Map étendu
useful_modifications.body: Mini-site /hermes-tools/ enrichi : outils, skills, répertoires, livrables, sauvegarde, serveurs réalisés et modifications utiles.

useful_modifications.title: Sécurisation de l’inventaire public
useful_modifications.body: Inventaire limité aux chemins, tailles, dates et notes générales. Pas de secrets, tokens, .env, clés privées ni contenus de session.

items.name: architecture-diagram
items.description: Dark-themed SVG architecture/cloud/infra diagrams as HTML.

items.name: spoken-message-delivery
items.description: Create and deliver concise spoken/audio replies for messaging platforms with TTS, timing control, language matching, script discipline, and provider limitation notes.

items.name: multi-agent-application-design
items.description: Design and scaffold multi-agent AI applications from existing agent frameworks without modifying framework internals.

items.name: recherche-information-roger
items.description: Use when helping Roger find and finance a post-BTS international commerce/business training program in France, prioritizing alternance before the end of June.

items.name: ai-agent-architect-mini-site
items.description: Use when the user wants to explain, teach, package, or extend the AI Agent Architect / Agentic AI Solutions Architect concept, especially with a maritime specialization, multi-agent workflows, CrewAI-style agents, and shareable HTML/CSS mini-sites.

items.name: roger1
items.description: Use when the user refers to Roger, the Roger mini-site, the HTML/CSS pages created for Roger, or Roger's role in marketing and market research for the maritime AI-agent project.

items.name: ai-automation-productization-deliverables
items.description: Turn AI automation ideas into sellable client-facing packages: productized offers, ROI estimates, implementation plans, shareable interactive diagrams, dossiers, and ZIP/HTML deliverables.

items.name: audio-transcription
items.description: Transcribe user-provided audio attachments and voice-note-like files into cleaned text, segments, summaries, and deliverable transcript files.

items.name: hermes-operations-security
items.description: Operate, observe, troubleshoot, and security-audit Hermes deployments, including API Server/Open WebUI integrations, token usage dashboards, Codex quota correlation, and prompt-injection hardening.

items.name: technology-discovery-and-watch
items.description: Discover current local tech/AI events and build scheduled technology-watch digests from sources like event pages, Reddit, RSS, blogs, and search results.

items.name: consumer-offer-risk-review
items.description: Review consumer-facing offers, trainings, coaching programs, subscriptions, guarantees, refund clauses, payment risk, CPF/funding eligibility, and public proof before the user pays.

items.name: youtube-content
items.description: YouTube transcripts to summaries, threads, blogs.

items.name: automotive-diagnostics
items.description: Diagnose vehicle faults from OBD codes, live sensor data, symptoms, photos, and repair documents; produce safe, prioritized on-site checklists in the user's language.

items.name: claude-design
items.description: Design one-off HTML artifacts (landing, deck, prototype).

items.name: minecraft-modpack-server
items.description: Host modded Minecraft servers (CurseForge, Modrinth).

items.name: hermes-token-monitoring
items.description: Monitor Hermes token consumption and ChatGPT/Codex quota windows using Hermes insights, local token dashboards, and Codex analytics.

items.name: maps
items.description: Geocode, POIs, routes, timezones via OpenStreetMap/OSRM.

items.name: self-hosted-media-server
items.description: Design and deploy personal media-server stacks: Jellyfin/Plex, qBittorrent, custom upload/progress portals, mobile streaming, Docker Compose, storage and security tradeoffs.

items.name: popular-web-designs
items.description: 54 real design systems (Stripe, Linear, Vercel) as HTML/CSS.

items.name: localized-web-research
items.description: Find and present web references in the user's requested language/locale, with clear source-quality labels and fallbacks when local-language sources are scarce.

items.name: desktop-media-assistant
items.description: Build/configure a Hermes-driven desktop or TV assistant for couch voice control of browser/media apps like YouTube, Netflix, VLC, and web search.

items.name: systematic-debugging
items.description: 4-phase root cause debugging: understand bugs before fixing.

items.name: marketplace-listing-research
items.description: Research local marketplace listings (cars, property, equipment) across public listing sites; extract comparable offers; produce ranked CSV/HTML/Markdown/JSON reports and ZIP deliverables with source limitations.

items.name: dogfood
items.description: Exploratory QA of web apps: find bugs, evidence, reports.

items.name: autonomous-static-site-delivery
items.description: Create, deploy, and autonomously QA static/landing sites for the user before reporting back.

items.name: static-site-vps-deployment
items.description: Build or adapt a static landing page and deploy it on a VPS behind Nginx, including brand/content updates, subpath hosting, and verification.

items.name: consumer-offer-due-diligence
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into consumer-offer-risk-review. Analyze consumer-facing offers by comparing marketing promises against legal/contract pages.

items.name: consumer-training-contract-review
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into consumer-offer-risk-review. Review training/coaching offers for refund, payment-risk, and CPF/funding issues.

items.name: hermes-open-webui-troubleshooting
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into hermes-operations-security. Troubleshoot Hermes API Server/Open WebUI integrations.

items.name: hermes-usage-monitoring
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into hermes-operations-security. Build, inspect, deploy, troubleshoot, and cost-analyze Hermes/LLM token usage.

items.name: local-tech-events
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into technology-discovery-and-watch. Discover and summarize local tech/AI/networking events for a city.

items.name: marketing-automation-agents
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into ai-automation-productization-deliverables. Plan, price, and package AI marketing automation agents.

items.name: prompt-injection-security-audits
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into hermes-operations-security. Audit AI-agent configurations for prompt-injection risk and hardening.

items.name: scheduled-tech-watch-digests
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into technology-discovery-and-watch. Build scheduled technology-watch automations and concise digests.

items.name: shareable-interactive-diagrams
items.description: ARCHIVED: absorbed into ai-automation-productization-deliverables. Build shareable static HTML mini-sites for diagrams and dossiers.
